{{Quote|Took out most of the army leaders. Nobody wanted to talk.|The Smuggler announces the deaths of Polcyc and Iavyn Ajik|<ref name="Gathering" />}}
'''Polcyc''' was an [[Abyssin]] [[scavenger]] who was a member of the [[Wreckers]], a loose affiliation of scavengers operating on the [[Water|ice]] [[Planet|world]] [[Hoth]]. During the [[Galactic Empire]]'s [[Iron Blockade]] of the [[Anoat sector]], Polcyc and fellow scavenger [[Iavyn Ajik]] acted as [[army]] leaders among the Wreckers<ref name="Gathering" /> under the leadership of the [[Ugnaught]] [[Ozgurk]], who had assumed the name of the Wreckers' former leader, [[Bohento Splinth]].<ref name="Splinth">''[[Star Wars: Uprising]]''—Story Mission: Splinth Revisited</ref>

Under Ozgurk, the Wreckers amassed in preparation to attack a series of camps set up by an anti-Imperial [[Uprising|alliance]] seeking to salvage [[starship]] weaponry from Hoth. In order to cause chaos among the Wreckers, a young [[The Smuggler|smuggler]] from the alliance fought through various scavengers to reach Polcyc and Ajik, who attacked the [[smuggler]] on sight. The pair were [[Death|slain]] in the battle, which caused chaos among the scavengers as planned and brought the alliance some breathing room. Polcyc had [[Color|white]] [[hair]], a black [[eye]], and green skin. The Abyssin wore white and gray [[armor]] and fought with a [[sword]].<ref name="Gathering" />

==Behind the scenes==
Polcyc appeared as a boss in the [[2015]] [[Star Wars video games|mobile game]] ''[[Star Wars: Uprising]]'', which was developed by [[Kabam]].<ref name="Gathering" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, the name Polcyc was given as an example of an [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] name in ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'', a [[2003]] supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Uprising]]'' {{1st}}
